testcase.name: testCreateUser
testcase.system-out: Request method: POST Request URI: https://www.ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/register Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Test", "lastName": "User", "email": "testuser_1775164179485@example.com", "password": "UserPassword@123", "confirmPassword": "UserPassword@123", "groupId": "1deae17a-c67a-4bb0-bdeb-df0fc9e2e526" } Registered User ID: 7c2b6477-17e3-40bd-9719-5ddc76828825
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details.

testcase.name: testAdminAuthentication
testcase.system-out: Request method: POST Request URI: https://www.ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "email": "spare@admin.com", "password": "@12345678", "token": null, "refreshToken": null, "role": null } Admin token extracted.

testcase.name: testApproveAndPromoteUser

testcase.name: testVerifyNewUserRole
testcase.system-out: Request method: POST Request URI: https://www.ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "email": "testuser_1775164179485@example.com", "password": "UserPassword@123", "token": null, "refreshToken": null, "role": null } Verification successful: new user logged in with admin role.

testcase.name: testCleanupUser
testcase.system-out: Request method: DELETE Request URI: https://www.ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/7c2b6477-17e3-40bd-9719-5ddc76828825 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTE2NDE4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzc1MjUwNTgxfQ.8r9CxFn7W62U15WrXjgcFcLbJsdqwn8lwe0z16wy6NQ Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> Request method: DELETE Request URI: https://www.ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/7c2b6477-17e3-40bd-9719-5ddc76828825 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTE2NDE4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzc1MjUwNTgxfQ.8r9CxFn7W62U15WrXjgcFcLbJsdqwn8lwe0z16wy6NQ Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> Cleanup successful: user 7c2b6477-17e3-40bd-9719-5ddc76828825 deleted.
